inputs.text: Main thakawat mehsoos kar raha hoon, fever bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Bukhar aur thakan common viral infection ke symptoms hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi specific symptom nahi hai

inputs.text: Ab dry cough bhi shuru ho gayi hai, raat mein neend nahi aati

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough bronchitis ka common symptom hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever abhi bhi hai, lekin cough bhi shuru ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi specific symptom nahi hai, lekin cough hai

inputs.text: Raat ko pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai, aur cough abhi tak hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, wazan kam hona, aur cough >2 weeks Tuberculosis ke classic symptoms hain

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Bronchitis mein raat ko pasina aur wazan kam hona common nahi hai

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia mein cough aur fever hota hai, lekin raat ko pasina aur wazan kam hona nahi hota

inputs.text: Ab cough mein kuch khoon bhi aa raha hai, wazan bahut kam ho gayi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Khoon aa raha hai aur wazan kam ho gayi hai, Tuberculosis confirmed hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki bronchitis mein khoon nahi aata

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, kyunki pneumonia mein khoon nahi aata
